data.title: Cannabis Giant Tilray Doubles Down On Its Beer Business With New JetBlue Partnership
data.description: Tilray (TLRY) expands its craft beer strategy as JetBlue (JBLU) adds Montauk Brewing's Surf Beer to all flights.

data.title: Donald Trump Once Said Bitcoin 'Was Based On Thin Air,' Now His Media Company Is Launching BTC ETF
data.description: Trump Media & Technology Group (NASDAQ:DJT), which was co-founded by President Donald Trump, is pushing deeper into the world of finance with a filing for several custom exchange-traded funds, a move that comes after recently rolling

data.title: Kura Oncology Cancer Study Hits Primary Goal, Lays Out Plans For Phase 3 Studies
data.description: Kura Oncology and Kyowa Kirin reported positive Phase 2 results for ziftomenib in AML and plan Phase 3 trials, with an NDA submission set for Q2 2025.

data.title: Xcel Energy Misses Q4 Estimates, Reaffirms FY25 EPS Guidance, Focuses On Grid Modernization
data.description: Xcel Energy reported lower Q4 results with revenue of $3.12B, missing consensus of $3.77B and EPS of $0.81, lower than expected.

data.title: Dow Dips 150 Points; Bristol Myers Squibb Issues Weak Outlook
